title: Medieval Era Reigns
description: Just another medieval Minecraft modpack that aims for simple, beautiful worlds!
body:
🏰 Medieval Era Reigns
A vanilla-plus medieval immersion modpack.

✨ Features:
• Cinematic medieval visuals
• Enhanced combat & animations
• Beautiful terrain and atmosphere
• Lightweight & beginner-friendly

🎯 Focus:
Atmosphere over complexity.
No quests. No tech. Just medieval Minecraft.

🖥️ Performance:
Runs well on mid-range PCs (shader optional)

Join our Discord server! -> https://discord.gg/EnYm74Sejt
